title: Simply Alive X Fresh Animations
description: A compatibility addon for Simply Alive & Fresh Animations!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hqCjxNZNwNg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18cc247a0637c962dcc3566412faac5ff171f597.png)

## This is just a compatibility addon, for Simply Alive and Fresh Animations!

![Requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a986e292c6ee958eb1169505c54b3a96de394135.png)

- [Simply Alive](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simply-alive)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

OR **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)**

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b26b61134e15a3090e83246e0da3daefdc88ee3.png)
<details>
<summary>Click to Open</summary>

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Most CEM files were originally created by FreshLX for Fresh Animations, and were (most lightly) modified to add compatibility support.
Huge thanks to FreshLX for creating such an amazing pack!
This addon requires Fresh Animations:
- Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
- Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations
- Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fresh-animations-v1-0/

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1.** This "entire" — excluding Fresh Animations Content, such as JEM and JPM  — project is licensed under "All Rights Reserved".

**2.** You can include this pack in your modpack or server without asking for permission, as long as proper credit is given (either a link to the texture pack or: "Simply Alive x Fresh Animations - addon by guguzin gamer").

**3.** You are not allowed to resell, reupload or port this resource pack, under any circumstances, whether on this website or any other.

**4.** The official download sources are: Modrinth, Curseforge and Planet Minecraft. Any other website is unauthorized, and don't have permission, and may host pirated or malicious copies.

**5.** You MAY modify this pack for personal use — you can't share it publicly —. If you include a modified version in a modpack, you must add a .txt file describing what was changed.

**6.** The terms on Modrinth, Curseforge and Planet Minecraft take precedence over the terms included in the pack files.

**7.** You MAY use this resource pack for commercial purpose but ONLY with permission.

**8.** These terms are subject to change in the future.

_PS: Any question you can make in my Discord DM (or curseforge/video comments)._

</details>
